case_title: ARBENZ, ELLEN vs. CUNARD LINES et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARBENZ, ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT CUNARD LINES DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-04-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-06-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-15-1995

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-05-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-05-1996, FOR DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR MAY-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARBENZ, ELLEN
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1996, CONTINUED TO MAR-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF NECESSARY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-04-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-04-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR APR-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-10-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 5/10/96: FOR DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
